title: Tornyol — Mosquito Killing Micro-Drone
abstract: Tornyol is a micro-drone concept designed specifically to hunt and kill mosquitoes. The project involves a small autonomous aerial robot capable of detecting and eliminating mosquitoes as a pest control solution. The drone is intended to address mosquito-borne disease transmission by targeting individual insects in flight or at rest. The concept represents an application of micro-robotics and autonomous systems to public health and pest management challenges.
